creator: pgollucci@taximagic.com
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Stas,

AFAIK, this PR does *not* need more work.
XPI_FILES/XPI_DIRS are equivalent to PLIST_FILES/PLIST_DIRS for
xpi ports and are processed in www/xpi-adblock/Makefile.xpi.

It *does* install the files and with 12 files + dirs a pkg-plist seems
to make more sense to me then listing them in the Makefile.

That said, I'll it up to you for this pr.


$ tarx xpi-vimperator-2.3.1.tbz
x +CONTENTS
x +COMMENT
x +DESC
x +MTREE_DIRS
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/chrome/vimperator.jar
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/components/about-handler.js
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/components/commandline-handler.js
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/components/protocols.js
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/modules/storage.jsm
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/AUTHORS
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/Donors
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/License.txt
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/NEWS
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/TODO
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/chrome.manifest
x lib/xpi/vimperator@mozdev.org/install.rdf
